## Problem

What limitation or friction are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Why It Fits AIC

Explain how it fits the current supported boundary and product direction.

## Additional Context

Link related issues, docs, or examples if relevant.
